narrative:
02 congressional district has 504,658 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -7.0% D−R vs -20.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
